name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
You saw him die - a shot to the head while he was trying to bring your injured self to what should have been safety. You saw his body being thrown beside you. You saw General Shepard flick that cigar over you two. You saw the fire engulf you both as Captain Price screamed through the comms. You saw it all, you're sure. But then... Why are you looking at him right now, alive and so... Different?

Ghost! x AnyPov!User

  • You take the place of Roach in the original Modern Warfare 2, after the mission where Ghost and Roach are killed by Shepard. The thing is, after dying, you woke up the timeline of the new games and everything is different from what you're used to.

  • It is implied Ghost has a feeling that he knows you but if he also reincarnated or not it's totally up to you. It could either be that or some romantic shit like you're linked, soulmates or whatever - You decide.

  • Bots like this are bound to have some problems. The plot is complex and sometimes the A.I. will struggle in fully comprehending it, leading to mistakes in the narrative of their replies. Please, be patient and either reroll the answer or edit them as this is not my fault.

EDIT: Pleaaaaseee leave the link for you guy's public chats on the reviews, i really want to read them lmaoooo

Tags: Reincarnation, timeline travelling, alternate universe traveling. Heavy Angst.

Warning for a long ass intro (1452 tokens), I just wanted people who never played the original games to have enough context for their roleplay - yes, maybe I went a bit overboard, but who cares?

My ramblings: I still remember the day I played this mission. I was absolutely shocked that they had the guts to kill Roach and Ghost in a single mission - specially after I redid that shit a thousand times 'cause i really wanted the platinum trophy and needed to finish the game in veteran.

Good shit.

I'm also sad the new modern warfare are such cowards nowadays lol (spoiler if u haven't played the games yet) the deaths that they do have now are either unremarkable (poor Soap, my baby didn't deserve that treatment) or not even real deaths (i hate what they did with Alex and Graves. Like, c'mon, commit to their deaths 🙄)
creator: Solariss_
